reviews.comment:
La estación bien, normal, como cualquier otra YPF ACA, lo que me llamó la atención es el Retoño del histórico pino de San Lorenzo

(Translated by Google)
The station was fine, normal, like any other YPF ACA; what caught my attention was the sapling of the historic San Lorenzo pine tree.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ONFVXRXlORGN0VTBab1JYSjVOa0kyY1cxTGQxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy linda estacion de servicio

(Translated by Google)
Very nice service station
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GRVZHMVNkaTFSWkdaU1NWVlZlbVZCZVcweVpVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio. La confiteria tiene cosas ricas, ya, sea para comer en el lugar o para llevar. Baños limpios. Lástima que con la reforma de la ruta 8 quedó mal ubicada.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The bakery has delicious treats, whether you eat in or take away. Clean restrooms. It's a shame it's in a bad location now that Route 8 has been rebuilt.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWd2FrbEZlblZ0TWkxb1JqbFdVVVpFVUdWVk5sRRAB

reviews.comment:
Llegamos con hambre pleno mediodía de lunes y había opicones para comer de inmediato, pedimos los sanguches de milanesa con lehuga y tomate y una hamburguesa. Todo muy rico, fresco (nuevo) y abundante. Muy agusto la verdad. No le doy 5 estrellas porque NO es muy accesible desde la autopista, falta señalización y es muy facil pasarse de largo.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived starving on a Monday at midday and there were plenty of options to eat right away. We ordered the breaded cutlet sandwiches with lettuce and tomato, and a hamburger. Everything was delicious, fresh (new), and plentiful. We were very comfortable, to be honest. I'm not giving it 5 stars because it's not very accessible from the highway; there's a lack of signage, and it's very easy to miss.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paQk1WOUhTMjVhZGtsbWFHSnNVRmRLT1V4aE9FRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto por la mañana y la noche. Baños en condiciones, agua caliente gratis y espacio verde para descansar al aire libre.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both morning and night. Clean bathrooms, free hot water, and a green space to relax outdoors.
